response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C/C++, Python-adjacent), TDD/craftsmanship orientation, and database/Docker/Kubernetes exposure align well with the stack. Minor gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but the foundation is strong enough that ramp-up should be quick.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with current TypeScript/Node.js + React production work at Optilyz
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly matches a key requirement
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, DLang, C/C++) with TDD/craftsmanship and DevOps/Docker/K8s background
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest not called out specifically (testing background present but framework unclear)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era), may need refresh for secondary stack
